overall.description: First-person driving gameplay from Cyberpunk 2077 through a rain-soaked futuristic city at night. The vehicle navigates from neon-lit commercial streets onto elevated highways, passing holographic billboards and massive brutalist architecture while rain streaks across the windshield and neon reflections shimmer on wet asphalt.

events.description: vehicle slows approaching intersection with red traffic light
approaching crosswalk and intersection, preparing to turn

agents.ego_description: driving through rain-soaked city streets following a red vehicle ahead, navigating between neon storefronts

notable_agents.action: red car driving ahead in same lane, maintaining distance

entered.detail: wet asphalt street lined with futuristic commercial buildings and neon signage
large illuminated billboard with 'Community' text in yellow and purple
row of shops with glowing holographic displays and neon trim
massive concrete pillars supporting overhead highway structure

segments.scene_description: Driving through a rain-soaked cyberpunk commercial district at night, following a red vehicle past neon-lit storefronts. The windshield shows heavy rain streaks while the dashboard displays vehicle metrics. The street is flanked by digital billboards including a prominent 'Community' sign, with elevated highway structures visible ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban intersection with crosswalks transitioning to highway

events.description: vehicle turns left at intersection, crossing zebra stripes
exits city street and enters highway on-ramp with concrete barriers

agents.ego_description: executing left turn at intersection then accelerating onto highway ramp, merging into faster traffic

entered.detail: yellow and blue striped pedestrian crossing markings
curved entrance ramp leading to elevated highway with concrete barriers
elevated walkway crossing above the street with glass sides

segments.scene_description: The vehicle executes a left turn across a zebra-striped crosswalk, leaving the commercial district behind. After the turn, the scene opens into a wider intersection before transitioning onto a highway on-ramp. Concrete barriers line the ramp as the vehicle accelerates toward the elevated highway structure.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated highway with guardrails and overhead signage

events.description: vehicle accelerates to higher speed on curved highway section
highway straightens, revealing dense neon billboards on both sides

agents.ego_description: accelerating along elevated highway curves, maintaining lane position while speed increases

notable_agents.action: distant vehicle ahead with red taillights visible in the rain

entered.detail: silver metal safety barriers along the elevated highway edge
large red billboard displaying 'FRAGILE' text with warning symbol
suspended lighting fixtures illuminating the highway from above
multiple holographic advertising screens lining both sides of the highway

segments.scene_description: The vehicle accelerates along a curving elevated highway, guarded by metal railings on the left. Overhead lights illuminate the rain-slicked road as the highway straightens, revealing a corridor of digital billboards including a prominent red 'FRAGILE' sign. The speed increases significantly as the urban landscape opens up.

scene_state.functional_zone: high-speed highway with dense digital advertising and futuristic architecture

events.description: vehicle reaches high speed, passing under overhead digital signage
massive futuristic building complex becomes visible on the right horizon

agents.ego_description: cruising at high speed through the neon highway corridor, overtaking occasional vehicles

notable_agents.action: purple sedan driving in parallel lane, occasionally changing speed

entered.detail: enormous curved digital display showing animated advertisements
massive brutalist building complex with glowing windows and industrial design
large circular pink neon structure visible in the distance
dark opening of a tunnel or covered highway section ahead

segments.scene_description: High-speed driving through a canyon of digital billboards and massive screens. The highway stretches straight ahead toward a futuristic mega-structure with a circular neon sign visible on the right. Multiple lanes of traffic include a purple sedan pacing alongside, while overhead signs and tunnel entrances loom in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: futuristic highway interchange with massive support structures

events.description: entering massive concrete interchange with multiple levels and ramps
vehicle navigates through curved section of elevated highway system

agents.ego_description: navigating complex highway interchange, passing under massive concrete overpasses and alongside brutalist architecture

notable_agents.action: orange vehicle ahead maintaining distance on the curved ramp

entered.detail: complex multi-level highway junction with massive support pillars and ramps
tall structure with horizontal blue neon lighting strips
raw concrete walls with geometric patterns and weathered surfaces
enclosed pedestrian or vehicle bridge crossing above the highway

segments.scene_description: The vehicle enters a massive highway interchange with towering concrete pillars and brutalist architecture. Blue-lit futuristic buildings flank the left side while the road curves through the complex structure. The environment becomes more enclosed as the vehicle passes under overhead walkways and navigates the elevated ramps of the futuristic infrastructure.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person perspective as a vehicle moves from a dense, neon-lit commercial district onto a high-speed elevated highway. It begins by following a red car through rain-soaked streets, where heavy streaks blur the view of digital billboards and glowing storefronts. As the vehicle executes a left turn across a zebra-striped crosswalk, the cramped urban corridor opens into a wider intersection before transitioning onto a concrete highway on-ramp. The scene then shifts to a curving elevated road guarded by metal railings, where overhead lights illuminate the slick asphalt. Finally, the vehicle accelerates rapidly down a straightening highway, passing a prominent red FRAGILE sign as the city landscape expands into a wide, futuristic vista.

The shot follows a high-speed journey through a neon-drenched digital canyon that gradually transitions into a dense, brutalist highway interchange. It begins with a straight sprint past towering digital billboards and massive screens, pacing alongside a purple sedan as a circular neon sign glows to the right. As the vehicle accelerates toward the horizon, the open vista of the commercial district shifts into a complex network of elevated ramps and towering concrete pillars. The scene then becomes more enclosed, curving through a maze of blue-lit futuristic buildings and passing under heavy overhead walkways. Finally, the camera navigates the deep shadows of the massive infrastructure, moving deeper into the heart of the city's industrial architecture.
